title: Constraint
description: The base shape of a constraint object. `required_fields` names properties of the constrained object that MUST be present in it's schema. Additional properties are domain-specific custom constraint keys defined by concrete constraint schemas.

required_fields.description: Names of properties on the constrained object that MUST be present. Concrete constraint schemas may narrow these to the known property names of the constrained schema when they want default machine validation for the current schema version.
